Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants a description of the underlying loan approval process using the DECLARE model

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: They want step by step explanation how constraints enforce order motivations behind rules and consequences if out of order or omitted

Text: We must comply with policy no disallowed content This is a normal request for explanation of business process No policy violation

Text: We should produce a thorough answer describe each activity explain constraints like existence init response precedence etc

Text: Show how they enforce order e g response from Receive Application to Preliminary Credit Check ensures credit check after application succession ensures Gather Additional Documents after credit check altresponse etc
